---
title: "OPINION - What are Opinions? Integrating Theory and Methods for Automatically Analyzing Opinionated Communication"
date: "2022"
year: "2022-2026"
funder: "European Cooperation in Science and Technology, CA21129"
categories: [Public Opinion & Argument Mining]
---

OPINION - What are Opinions? Integrating Theory and Methods for Automatically Analyzing Opinionated Communication
